description: pefile is a Python module to read and work with PE (Portable Executable) files. Useful for malware analysis.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/pefile && python3 pefile.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/pefile && python3 pefile.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/pefile && python3 pefile.py --help`. PE (Portable Executable) parser.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the exploit category. Fits when the engagement needs: PE (Portable Executable) parser.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: PE (Portable Executable) parser.

name: pefile

trust.notes: Operator-curated Python library. The pip name is resolved from PyPI; the import name is verified against the registry.
